Interface EngineProperties.SetProperty

All Known Implementing Classes:
Allure.SetProperty, API.SetProperty, BrowserStack.SetProperty, Flags.SetProperty, Healenium.SetProperty, Healing.SetProperty, Jira.SetProperty, LambdaTest.SetProperty, Mobile.SetProperty, NaturalActions.SetProperty, Paths.SetProperty, Pattern.SetProperty, Performance.SetProperty, Pilot.SetProperty, Platform.SetProperty, Playwright.PlaywrightSetProperty, Reporting.SetProperty, Timeouts.SetProperty, Tinkey.SetProperty, Visuals.SetProperty, Web.SetProperty
Enclosing interface:
EngineProperties<T>
public static interface EngineProperties.SetProperty
Marker interface implemented by every concrete fluent property-override builder. Concrete implementations expose typed setter methods that update the underlying property source and return this to support method chaining.
